description: Uses single Arabic word that operates on two cultural levels simultaneously (e.g., 'ترتوي' = irrigated + narrated).
structural_recipe: Uses single Arabic word that operates on two cultural levels simultaneously (e.g., 'ترتوي' = irrigated + narrated).
why_it_works: Signature of Heritage Decoder; highest-leverage when it lands.
transplantation_caveats: Hard to find authentic dual-meanings; forced ones backfire.
